response.justification: Strong generalist senior engineer with 13+ years of production experience, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, and solid backgrounds in TypeScript/Node and data-heavy systems. However, the resume lacks explicit, in-depth GenAI delivery experience (RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks, LLM evaluation/observability) and significant cloud-platform AI system design beyond AWS CDK usage. Customer-facing technical discovery and Python experience are also not clearly demonstrated, making fit for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role uncertain without further screening.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production systems across full stack, including TypeScript/Node and high-throughput data services
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, talks, courses, and Staff-level roles
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Python is not in the skills list; primary languages are TS, DLang, and JS
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery or enterprise integration consulting

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and cloud-AI platform specifics
